result.note: REAL production Cycles render: scene='bmw27' (1920x1080, bounces=12). DRAFT = spp cap 512 + adaptive sampling (thr=0.02, min=16) + oidn denoiser with albedo+normal prefiltered guide passes (prefilter=ACCURATE), denoise IN-PIPELINE so its cost is INSIDE draft_render_s. REFERENCE = 4096 spp, adaptive OFF, denoise OFF (ground truth). Both renders are genuine whole-subprocess wall-clock (launch+.blend load+BVH+trace+denoise+PNG encode, NO exclusions) on the SAME box, SAME Blender build, SAME resolution/bounces/device. SSIM (global + per-8x8-tile min/p5) is real scikit-image on the two real rendered PNGs. net_speedup=ref/draft wall-clock. Reference was rendered ONCE on this box and cached by (scene,resolution,ref_spp,bounces); ref_render_s is that real measured time.
